brand.taglineShort: Amazon gear checklists for American V-twin and cruiser riders.

methodology: We prioritize gear with verified cruiser/touring fitment notes in listing text.
We do not publish live Amazon prices unless pulled from approved catalog data at build time.
Every buying guide includes: As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.
We are not affiliated with Harley-Davidson, Inc. or any motorcycle OEM.
We re-check top picks quarterly and remove discontinued ASINs.
Reader fitment corrections are updated within 72 hours.

newsletter.title: The V-Twin Rider Kit weekly
newsletter.subtitle: Practical picks and straight answers from V-Twin Rider Kit, once a week. No spam.

defaultMetaDescription: Practical checklists, road-tested gear picks, and garage essentials for cruiser and touring riders — organized by ride type, not hype.

homepage.h1: The Amazon Gear Guide for V-Twin Riders
homepage.subhead: Practical checklists, road-tested gear picks, and garage essentials for cruiser and touring riders — organized by ride type, not hype.
homepage.trustLine: Independent gear guide. Not affiliated with Harley-Davidson or any OEM. We disclose Amazon Associates links on every buying guide.

about.headline: Why V-Twin Rider Kit exists
about.body: We ride American cruisers and baggers and got tired of scattered forum lists and dealer upsells. We organize Amazon-buyable touring gear, garage tools, comfort upgrades, and road-trip kits with fitment notes and honest comparisons — never pretending to be an official brand site.
